# PERF-214 negative: cache key is stable
lang: go
file: PERF-214-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

type Entry struct {
	ID string
}

func Render(entry Entry) int {
	var cache sync.Map
	key := entry.ID
	if v, ok := cache.Load(key); ok {
		return v.(int)
	}
	cache.Store(key, len(entry.ID))
	return len(entry.ID)
}
